name: Malta Gaming Authority
approved_labs_note: GLI and BMM Testlabs operate under the same parent company as of 2022; whichever appears on the approved list is the relevant authority. Verify the current MGA Approved Audit Service Provider list before engaging a lab.
notes: MGA explicitly references NIST SP 800-22 in its Technical Standards. Minimum 85% RTP must be disclosed to players. Re-testing required on any material change to the RNG.
